NativeVisualCalculation.Expression:
var currentyeartatavg = LOOKUPWITHTOTALS([Avg TAT],[Year1],YEAR(TODAY())-1)
RETURN IF(ISBLANK([Avg TAT]),BLANK(),DIVIDE([Avg TAT]-currentyeartatavg,currentyeartatavg,0))
NativeVisualCalculation.Name: Against 2025 TAT Avg
